caption: Table 137. Document revision history
rows: Updated Table 3: STM32N647xx features and peripheral counts, Table 5: STM32N657xx features and peripheral counts, Table 18: Pin description, Table 21: Voltage characteristics, Table 24: General operating conditions, Table 40: Current consumption in Sleep mode, Table 60: OTP characteristics, Table 63: ESD absolute maximum ratings, Table 67: RPU/RPD characteristics, and Table 95: ADC accuracy. Updated Figure 3: Device startup with VCORE supplied directly from an external SMPS and Figure 4: Device startup with VCORE supplied directly from the internal SMPS. Added Section 6.8: Package thermal characteristics. Minor text edits across the whole document.

Document scope extended to STM32N645xx and STM32N655xx devices. Updated document title, Features. Section 1: Introduction, Section 2: Description, Section 3.3: AXI cache configuration, Section 3.4.4: SMPS usage, Section 3.5: Convolution neural network accelerator (NPU), Section 3.33: Secure AES coprocessor (SAES), Section 3.34: Cryptographic processor (CRYP), Section 3.36: Memory cipher engine (MCE), Section 3.37: Public key accelerator (PKA), and Section 7: Ordering information. Added Section 5.3.4: SMPS step-down converter. Updated Table 1: Device summary, Table 7: Functionalities depending on system operating mode, Table 17: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table, Table 18: Pin description, and tables in Section 5.3.6: Supply current characteristics. Added Table 2: STM32N645xx features and peripheral counts and Table 4: STM32N655xx features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 68: VFBGA169 - Outline(13). Minor text edits across the whole document.

Updated Features, Section 2: Description, Section 3.4: Power supply management, Section 3.4.4: SMPS usage, and Section 3.30: Video encoder (VENC). Updated Figure 11: VFBGA198 ballout. Updated Table 2: STM32N645xx features and peripheral counts, Table 3: STM32N647xx features and peripheral counts, Table 4: STM32N655xx features and peripheral counts, Table 5: STM32N657xx features and peripheral counts, Table 18: Pin description, Table 24: General operating conditions, Table 33: Current consumption (core) in Run mode, Table 34: Current consumption (core) in Run mode, Table 39: Current consumption (SMPS) in Run mode, Table 42: Current consumption in Stop mode, and Table 66: Leakage characteristics. Minor text edits across the whole document.

Updated Features, Section 3.25: Camera subsystem, Section 5.3.37: Embedded PHY characteristics, and Section 7: Ordering information. Updated tables 2 to 5, Table 18: Pin description and its footnotes, Table 23: Thermal characteristics, tables 31 to 40, and Table 45: Current consumption in VBAT mode. Added Figure 9: VFBGA169GP ballout. Added notes to Typical and maximum current consumption.

Updated Features. Removed former Section 3.28: Display subsystem. Updated tables 2 to 5, Table 17: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table, Table 18: Pin description, Table 21: Voltage characteristics, tables 24 to 28, Table 43: Current consumption in Stop mode, tables 47 to 49, Table 68: NRST pin characteristics, tables 94 to 96, and Table 99: VBAT, VDDx, VDDCORE, VDDA18AON, ADC measurement characteristics. Updated Figure 25: Recommended NRST pin protection.
Updated tables 2 to 5 and their footnotes. Updated Table 24: General operating conditions. Minor text edits across the whole document.

Updated Table 20: Alternate functions: AF8 to AF15, Table 23: Thermal characteristics, Table 24: General operating conditions, Table 44: Current consumption in Standby mode, Table 45: Current consumption in VBAT mode, Table 91: Dynamic characteristics: SD, VDD = 1.71 V to 3.6 V, and Table 92: Dynamic characteristics: eMMC, VDD = 1.71 V to 3.6 V. Updated Section 6.8: Package thermal characteristics.
Updated Table 18: Pin description and Table 20: Alternate functions: AF8 to AF15.
